title: KRYPTON 1000W Single Hot Plate for Table Top Cooking | 150mm Single Solid Ring Hob with Cast Iron Heating Plate, Adjustable Temperature | Lightweight & Portable hob for Home Camping & Caravan Cooking
features: ✅ 150MM SINGLE CAST IRON HOB, PERFECT COOKING SOLUTION - This 1000W hot plate has a high quality and durable cast iron of 150mm heating element for quick and sustained heating. Use with all types of cookware to boil, fry, or keep food. Ideal for camping, holiday homes, parties, events, student accommodation, or as an extra appliance in a busy kitchen.

✅ VARIABLE HEAT CONTROL - Make heating much easier - With various heat settings, these Hot Plate Hob can accommodate a wide range of cooking requirements from simmering to boiling, heating has never been more easy or simple.

✅ COMPACT & PORTABLE, NON-SLIP RUBBER FEET - This hot plate is not only compact for easy storage, but also portable. We built this hot plate with safety and convenience in mind - The feet of this double hot plate is non-slip.

✅ OVERHEAT PROTECTION, AUTO THERMOSTAT, INDICATOR LIGHT - This safety feature avoids danger when the temperature of the hot plate goes too high. The indicator light turns off immediately and when temperature is back to normal, it turns back on and heating resumes.

✅ ALTERNATIVE USES, 2 YEAR WARRANTY: Highly versatile, table-top cast iron hob with multi-cooking functions makes it ideal for camping, holiday homes, parties, events, student accommodation, or as an extra appliance in a busy kitchen. Use it for Warming, Cooking, Boiling, Frying, Simmering, and much more.
description: Product Description CAST IRON COOKING SURFACE This 1000W hot plate has a high quality and durable cast iron for quick and sustained heating. SINGLE BURNER 150 mm single cast iron hob which is a perfect cooking solution. FAST HEATING Make heating much easier - With various heat settings. ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE CONTROL Use it for Warming, Cooking, Boiling, Frying, Simmering, and much more. VERSATILE COMPATIBILITY Highly versatile, table-top cast iron hob with multi-cooking functions makes it ideal for camping OVERHEAT PROTECTION This safety feature avoids danger when the temperature of the hot plate goes too high. INDICATOR LIGHT The indicator light turns off immediately and turns back on and heating resumes. COMPACT & PORTABLE This hot plate is not only compact for easy storage, but also portable.
